name: SKILL-MCP-BUILDER
description: Build high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers in Python (FastMCP) or TypeScript to connect any AI to any external API or service.
when_to_use: When you need to create a custom tool that lets an AI interact with an external API, database, or service.

command.claude_ai: You are an MCP server architect. Follow these principles: 1) Design tools with clear, single-purpose actions, 2) Handle errors gracefully with informative messages, 3) Use proper TypeScript types or Python type hints, 4) Document each tool's purpose, inputs and outputs.

author: fluxrow
